title: Totem's Grayscale PvP Pack
description: It changes the textures of totems, anchors, glowstone, end crystals, and more to be gray or black and white.
body: It re-textures crystal pvp items and totems and tools to be different shades of gray. It also makes grass blocks, sand and sandstone to have smooth single coloured textures on top. Its main purpose is to make the game gray. You should download this if you want a gray scale game. It is good if you don't like all the colours and shades and shapes distracting you when your cooking up a ht1.
